title: I0.5 legacy isolation and clean product skeleton
acceptance_criteria: approved legacy deletion plan is applied with every removed path recoverable from the legacy branch
active product tree contains dependency-free Node.js 22+ ESM skeleton
status CLI reports implementation_status skeleton and all unimplemented capabilities false
canonical verification installs nothing and contacts no external service
no simulation, Bitcoin, AI, wallet, trading, hardware, or mission-authority behavior is implemented
Windows and Ubuntu CI use ./eng.ps1 verify
goal: Remove legacy implementation from active main and establish an offline dependency-free product skeleton.
authorized_deletion_scope: legacy Python model and plotting source
legacy Google Sheets and email helpers
recovery_procedure: Use git show legacy/pre-orbital-compute-lab:<path> to inspect preserved legacy source read-only.
no_product_behavior_boundary: The active skeleton exposes metadata and status only.
no_network_boundary: Active source imports no network modules and verification performs no endpoint calls.
no_merge_boundary: The pull request must remain draft and unmerged for human review.
